name: static-publishing-workflow
description: Example declarative extension that combines publish readiness metadata, frontmatter fields, a publish checklist widget, and a safe table-of-contents transform.

permissions.reason: Reads local Markdown frontmatter, headings, and publish checklist items already available to Forge.
Writes a bounded generated table of contents into the current note when requested.

contributes.label: Publishing workflow metadata
contributes.description: Declares publish, frontmatter, and heading fields useful for static-site preparation.

contributes.label: Publish checklist
contributes.description: Declares Forge's supported local publishing checklist sidebar widget.

contributes.label: Insert generated table of contents
contributes.description: Declares the supported generated table-of-contents transform for publish-ready notes.
